title: inula rotundifolia
intro: Inula rotundifolia, also known as knapweed balsam or round-headed knapweed, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Inula rotundifolia include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Inula rotundifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine.
